videos.title: 2023.02.04 König Ludwig Lauf 2023 - FT 43 km - Olga Kasatkina
videos.description:
EN
König Ludwig Lauf is the largest ski marathon in Germany, was founded in 1968 and is held in Oberammergau and Ettal in the Ammergau Alps Nature Park. It is part of the Worldloppet series and annually gathers cross-country skiers from more than 30 countries.

Excellent organization, interesting track, difficult weather conditions and perfect result guarantee memories for a long time.

RU
König Ludwig Lauf - крупнейший лыжный марафон в Германии, основанный в 1968 году и проходящий в Обераммергау и Эттале в Ammergau Alps Nature Park. Он входит в серию Worldloppet и ежегодно собирает любителей лыжных гонок из более чем 30 стран.

Отличная организация, интересная трасса, сложные погодные условия и отличный результат гарантируют воспоминания на долгое время.

#koenigludwiglauf #crosscountryskiing #xcskiing #winter #ammergaueralpen #skiing #activelife

videos.title: Konig Ludwig Lauf 2011
videos.description: Ski the Konig Ludwig Lauf cross-country ski race with Saul Goldman. This is a citizen racers perspective of this World Loppet race. It is held annually in Oberamergau, Germany. Oberamergau, Germany is famous for its Passion Play, held once every ten years. It is less famous for the annual Konig Ludwig Lauf ski race, named after the Bavarian King Ludwig II. He commissioned the construction of several extravagant fantasy castles and palaces.Since his legacy of grandiose castles lives on in the form of massive tourist revenue, King Ludwig is generally well liked and even revered by many in Bavaria today.
tags: Cross counry ski race world Loppet

videos.title: Show Case Cross Country Skiing: König Ludwig Lauf Germany
🎥  Vlog Gunnar's Nordic Adventures at König Ludwig Lauf 2022 ( with paragliding🪂)
videos.description:
🎥 Vlog coming in 3,2,1...🎥
Gunnar's Nordic Adventures, this time from Oberammergau 🇩🇪 , the home of the royal König Ludwig Lauf 👑 !
The 2022 edition of the german Worldloppet race was an adventure for itself, as it was finally celebrating a comeback to the tracks after 2 years break. Only happy faces to see among the thousands of starters, but see by yourself.
💥 But of course, we want to experience the venues of Worldloppet also from another perspective, so for this Vlog Gunnar took off into the sky, to experience Oberammergau and the tracks of KLL from above during a paragliding flight 🪂. Btw: Northug Glasses also perform high in the sky 🤙
🤝 Special thanks go to:
👑 König Ludwig Lauf for hosting us
🪂 fly-garmisch.com Gleitschirm Paragliding
🕶 Petter Northug for supporting us with great glasses & clothing See less
